requirements.summary: Preserve deterministic create-execplan orchestration and final artifact model.
Keep each child phase to a single fresh Codex process with no nested planning or child-agent orchestration.
Validate the isolation rule with repo-local regression checks and a live Codex smoke.

sources.title: Phase controller
sources.trust_rationale: Canonical phase controller and prompt/schema source.

sources.title: Helper regression checks
sources.trust_rationale: Regression harness for wrapper and controller behavior.

sources.title: Live Codex smoke harness
sources.trust_rationale: Live smoke harness for real codex exec behavior.

sources.title: Mock repro findings
sources.trust_rationale: Summarized evidence from the end-to-end mock reproduction.

notes: The first live reproduction failed on invalid_json_schema because blockingIssues was omitted from the schema required list.
The second live reproduction invoked spawn_agent inside the child requirements-freeze phase before wrapper isolation was added.
Helper and live smoke checks passed after the controller and wrapper fixes were applied.
